---
title: "sosfiltfilt"
generated: true
description: "Zero-phase forward-backward IIR filter (scipy `sosfiltfilt`-exact)."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.signal.filter`](../nitrix-signal-filter.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.signal._iir`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sosfiltfilt -->
```python
sosfiltfilt(X: Num[Array, '... obs'], sos: np.ndarray, *, axis: int = -1, padtype: str = 'odd', padlen: Optional[int] = None, driver: _Driver = 'auto', impulse_atol: float = 1e-12) -> Num[Array, '... obs']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sosfiltfilt -->
Zero-phase forward-backward IIR filter (scipy `sosfiltfilt`-exact).

Filters forward then backward with steady-state initial conditions and
odd padding, cancelling phase and squaring the magnitude response.
Matches `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` to machine precision.

Both passes thread the steady-state `zi` initial conditions through the
resolved engine (`driver='auto'` -> `'fft'` on GPU, `'scan'` on CPU;
see [`sosfilt`](../nitrix-signal-filter/sosfilt.qmd)).  The FFT engine adds the `zi` transient
`x[0] * g` (the cascade's zero-input response) over the first `n_taps`
samples, so the edges stay scipy-exact -- the zero-phase path is no longer
scan-only.  `impulse_atol` controls the FFT truncation (see
[`sosfilt`](../nitrix-signal-filter/sosfilt.qmd)).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sosfiltfilt -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` √ó `obs` | ‚Äî | Signal; filtered along `axis` (default trailing). |
| `sos` | `np.ndarray` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `(n_sections, 6)` second-order sections (e.g. from [`butterworth_sos`](../nitrix-signal-filter/butterworth_sos.qmd)). Static host coefficients (NumPy). |
| `axis` | `int` | ‚Äî | `-1` | Axis of `X` along which to filter (default `-1`, the trailing axis). |
| `padtype` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'odd'` | Edge-padding scheme applied before the forward-backward passes. Only `'odd'` padding is supported. |
| `padlen` | `Optional[int]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Number of samples reflected at each edge. `None` (default) uses the scipy convention (`3 * (2 * n_sections + 1 - n_trivial)`, where `n_trivial` counts first-order sections); must be less than the signal length along `axis`. |
| `driver` | `_Driver` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | Numerical variant for both passes (see [`sosfilt`](../nitrix-signal-filter/sosfilt.qmd)): `'auto'` (default), or a forced `'fft'` / `'scan'` / `'associative'`. |
| `impulse_atol` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-12` | FFT-engine impulse-response truncation tolerance (see [`sosfilt`](../nitrix-signal-filter/sosfilt.qmd)). |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `obs`. The zero-phase filtered signal, same shape and dtype as `X`. Differentiable through `X`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:sosfiltfilt -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **11.97 ms** (median, L4); up to **2546.18√ó faster** than `nitrix-jax-scan`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SOSFILTFILT.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 194.29 ms / 206.30 ms | 536.69 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 259.72 ms / 285.63 ms | 556.70 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0081√ótol | 1.34x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 181.30 ms / 201.59 ms | 519.62 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 0.93x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 159.73 ms / 161.85 ms | 158.85 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.023√ótol | 0.82x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 12.62 ms / 13.30 ms | 2.920 s | 33.55 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.2√ótol | 1.07x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.83 ms / 11.97 ms | 403.21 ms | 469.77 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.013√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 11.83 ms / 11.93 ms | 283.78 ms | 469.77 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.013√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 2.401 s / 2.625 s | 3.850 s | 403.16 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.023√ótol | 202.96x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=32768,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 160.64 ms / 162.23 ms | 159.76 ms | 33.55 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.023√ótol | 13.58x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 48.60 ms / 52.84 ms | 520.80 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.02√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 47.66 ms / 63.87 ms | 244.58 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0071√ótol | 0.98x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 38.10 ms / 40.36 ms | 347.75 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.02√ótol | 0.78x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 28.71 ms / 29.79 ms | 32.82 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.021√ótol | 0.59x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 6.37 ms / 6.43 ms | 2.791 s | 8.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.19√ótol | 7.37x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 864.9 ¬µs / 885.3 ¬µs | 343.66 ms | 100.67 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 846.0 ¬µs / 858.8 ¬µs | 254.30 ms | 100.67 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 0.98x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 705.56 ms / 755.95 ms | 1.474 s | 159.38 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.021√ótol | 815.73x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=256,obs=8192,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 28.59 ms / 29.35 ms | 33.17 ms | 8.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.021√ótol | 33.06x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 5.25 ms / 5.96 ms | 425.61 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.018√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 5.45 ms / 6.30 ms | 251.14 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0055√ótol | 1.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 5.06 ms / 5.85 ms | 400.11 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.018√ótol | 0.96x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 3.95 ms / 3.97 ms | 4.49 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.017√ótol | 0.75x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 5.49 ms / 5.96 ms | 3.068 s | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.17√ótol | 27.23x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 201.7 ¬µs / 210.4 ¬µs | 360.73 ms | 12.58 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.011√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 210.6 ¬µs / 231.8 ¬µs | 353.33 ms | 12.58 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.011√ótol | 1.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 320.70 ms / 369.77 ms | 1.065 s | 36.70 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.017√ótol | 1590.16x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=4096,order=4 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 3.92 ms / 4.10 ms | 4.19 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.017√ótol | 19.43x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 204.39 ms / 237.79 ms | 758.39 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.024√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 122.02 ms / 147.11 ms | 574.47 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0088√ótol | 0.60x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 201.16 ms / 236.31 ms | 817.76 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.024√ótol | 0.98x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cpu | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 93.40 ms / 94.69 ms | 120.14 ms | 1070 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.035√ótol | 0.46x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `cupyx.scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 15.55 ms / 15.91 ms | 2.938 s | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.25√ótol | 4.16x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 3.74 ms / 3.78 ms | 356.18 ms | 234.88 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax-fft` | ok | 3.69 ms / 3.72 ms | 352.34 ms | 234.88 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.015√ótol | 0.99x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `nitrix-jax-scan` | ok | 9.511 s / 9.570 s | 10.171 s | 336.00 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.035√ótol | 2546.18x vs nitrix-jax |
| sosfiltfilt | jax-cuda12 | channels=64,obs=65536,order=8 | `scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt` | ok | 92.89 ms / 93.48 ms | 118.52 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.035√ótol | 24.87x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `1ea30547` ¬∑ nitrix `2dd4fc7b`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:sosfiltfilt -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
